offline_build.note: tsc -b typecheck + vite production build of the seeded reference-app's TypeScript; 422 modules transformed, no errors. Confirms the TS seed compiles. The Move package under contracts/ was NOT built or published — that requires the deepbook-sandbox + sui CLI (and the .external-packages/{token,deepbook} source deps), which is out of scope for the offline soundness check.

known_issues: FLAKY happy-path borrow: the DEEP_SUI vault's lendable base fluctuates around the 0.5 DEEP borrow on a freshly-deployed sandbox, so the borrow intermittently aborts with ENotEnoughBaseForLoan (vault::borrow_flashloan_base, code 1). Root cause: seedPoolBaseLiquidity() deposits DEEP into the BalanceManager, which does NOT feed the pool's flash-loanable vault base_balance — so the test is at the mercy of the market-maker's vault state, and unlike the swap test it has no borrow-retry. UPSTREAM FIX (in lessons/_snippets/03-flash-loan): make seedPoolBaseLiquidity actually fund the pool vault (e.g. rest a DEEP ask) and/or add a borrow-retry loop. NOTE: section 01-connect-fund.md currently teaches that seedPoolBaseLiquidity raises vault.base_balance — that claim is inaccurate and should be corrected alongside the fix.

This lesson's arb_executor Move package must be published before the live test: `DEEPBOOK_SANDBOX_DIR=$HOME/workspace/deepbook-sandbox/sandbox bash contracts/scripts/deploy.sh` (writes the chain-specific id into deployment.json). The committed deployment.json carries a placeholder id; re-publish after any sandbox re-genesis.

live_gate.command: pnpm vitest run (Move package published first via contracts/scripts/deploy.sh)
live_gate.sandbox: local deepbook-sandbox @ origin/main e62fa7d (pnpm deploy-all --quick); DEEP_SUI + SUI_USDC pools
live_gate.result: 2/2 live tests passed on the 5th attempt (borrow→execute_base→repay in one PTB; short-repay reverts inside arb_executor::execute_base). Earlier attempts aborted at vault::borrow_flashloan_base with ENotEnoughBaseForLoan (code 1).

learner_validation.note: Live equivalence gate now passes against a healthy sandbox. The dual-output-mode (learning/explanatory) learner sub-agent pass from lesson-creator Step 7 has not been run yet.
